历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 632 → 613 → 734 → 963 → 885, showing an overall backward trend. In the past 3 years, it moved from 613 to 885, a cumulative backward shift of about 272 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 885. Enrollment plans: 45 in 2021–2022, 41 in 2023, 40 in 2024, 38 in 2025, showing a yearly reduction. The 2026 plan is 43, an increase of 5 (+13.2%) over 2025, reversing the reduction trend for the first time, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked about 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top national university. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 44 (relatively hot), overall exposure is moderate. In 2024, there was significant negative public opinion, turning neutral/mixed in 2025. Disciplines: Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Physics A-, Business Administration A+, etc., with equally outstanding strength in science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 393,700. Estimated Physics Category proportion at about 64% gives about 251,400 people, slightly higher than 2025 (249,800). The provincial control line for 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, with no special regional preference in Hubei Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 885, the 2026 enrollment expansion (+13.2%) intensifying competition, a slight increase in Physics Category examinees, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: about 970, with a range of 854–1086.
